channel.title: Arrivau — Australian Home Loans, Property & Migration – Calculators
channel.description: Recent content in Calculators on Arrivau — Australian Home Loans, Property & Migration
channel.copyright:
Copyright © Arrivau Pty Ltd (ABN 81 643 901 599) · 16/650 George St, Sydney NSW 2000
ASIC Credit Representative CRN 530978 · NSW Real Estate Licence 20253209 · Registered Migration Agent MARN 1687552
Content on this site is general information only and does not constitute personal financial, tax or legal advice. Speak to a licensed professional before acting.

item.title: Australian income tax calculator 2025–26
item.author: hello@arrivau.com (Mitchell Harding)
item.description:
Coming soon — this calculator is being migrated across from the original arrivau.com.au Hugo build. All nine calculators will be live on this English site before the end of Q2 2026.

In the meantime, the identical tool is available at arrivau.com.au and the underlying maths is unchanged — the rate tables refresh monthly, the serviceability buffer follows APRA’s 3% floor and the stamp-duty logic covers all eight states and territories.

If you’d like an Arrivau broker to run the numbers for you by hand, phone +61 451 827 455 or email hello@arrivau.com — it takes about 20 minutes.
